title: The Stars Look Down
writer: A.J. Cronin, J.B. Williams, A. Coppel
actors: Michael Redgrave, Margaret Lockwood, Edward Rigby
plot: In a small coal-mining village Bob Fenwick leads a strike over safety standards at the local colliery. Meanwhile his son, David, goes off to university with the hope one day to return to help the miners with their working conditions.
